message:
fix(providers): accumulate streaming tool call deltas instead of overwriting

Fixes Azure and OpenAI provider SSE stream handling for tool calls.
Previously, when a tool call ID or function name arrived in multiple
SSE chunks, each delta would overwrite the previous value via
clone_from() / direct assignment. This caused truncated tool call
IDs and function names when the server split them across chunks.

Now uses push_str() to correctly append each delta fragment to the
accumulated string, matching the SSE streaming spec where tool call
fields can arrive incrementally.

- azure.rs: tc_state.id and tc_state.name use push_str, then
  clone_from to sync the content block
- openai.rs: tc.id and tc.name use push_str instead of assignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
